name: Sarah Lee
title: VP Sales
email_opener: Your focus on enabling 'any billing model' and implementing 'custom revenue models,' like the token-based usage pricing, really caught my eye. It highlights how Stripe helps businesses adapt and innovate their monetization strategies, which is something many companies find challenging.

name: Raj Patel
title: Head of Marketing
email_opener: I was really impressed to learn about Notion's "night shift" – your AI agents that keep work moving 24/7, capturing knowledge around the clock. It's clear how much you prioritize automating busywork and enhancing productivity for your users.

name: Emily Chen
title: CEO
email_opener: I was really impressed to see Airtable's latest innovations, especially enabling businesses to build custom apps with no code and deploy thousands of AI agents within them. It's exciting to see how your platform is evolving to empower teams to create truly enterprise-ready AI workflows.
